data.title: Meta introduces TRIBE v2, an AI model trained on 700+ subjects, predicting human brain activity. #neuroscience #AI
data.description: Meta has unveiled TRIBE v2, an AI foundation model crafted on a dataset encompassing 700+ subjects. This advanced model has the capability to generate digital replicas of human neural reactions to visual and audio stimuli.

data.title: Can-Fite Reports 2025 Financial Results and Ongoing Clinical Progress Highlighting Positive Data in Phase 2a Pancreatic cancer and 9 Years Cancer-Free Survival in Liver Cancer Patient
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Ramat Gan, Israel, Can-Fite BioPharma Ltd. released updates on their clinical progress and financial performance for the year ended December 31, 2025, and the beginning of 2026. The company, listed on NYSE American as CANF and on TASE as CANF, specializes in developing small molecule drugs for oncological and inflammatory conditions. This announcement signifies their commitment to advancing innovative treatments in these areas.

data.description: The company ended the year 2025 with a strong cash position, a balance sheet free of debt, and notable progress in its pipeline. This reflects the company's financial stability and successful project advancements.

data.title: Circle Could Double To $75B By 2030 Despite 20% Stock Crash, Says Bitwise's Matt Hougan
data.description: According to Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan, Circle Internet Group (NYSE: CRCL) is projected to achieve a valuation of $75 billion by 2030, despite experiencing a 20% drop on Tuesday due to Clarity Act news. Hougan's analysis is based on three main factors: the size of the stablecoin market, Circle's market share, and revenue margins. Citigroup (NYSE: C) predicts that the stablecoin market will expand from around $200 billion presently to $1.9 trillion by 2030. Currently, Circle's USDC (CRYPTO: USDC) holds a 25% market share, second only to Tether's USDT (CRYPTO: USDT). Hougan anticipates that Circle will maintain this 25% share, giving the company control of approximately $475 billion in stablecoins by 2030. Circle generates interest by investing customer deposits in U.S. Treasuries, which yield about 4%. However, the company allocates roughly 60% of revenue towards... (The full story can be found on Benzinga.com)

data.title: In HelloNation, Plumbing Expert Leslie Roe Highlights Proactive Water Heater Care
data.description: Regular maintenance is crucial for avoiding damage, extending the lifespan of systems, and ensuring consistent home comfort. A recent report from Traverse City, Michigan on March 26, 2026 revealed the importance of routine maintenance in preventing issues with water heaters. Homeowners can prevent disruptions from a failing water heater by following tips from HelloNation.

data.title: Summary Notice of Pendency and Proposed Settlement Involving All Persons who Purchased or Otherwise Acquired GSX Securities Between June 6, 2019 and October 20, 2020, Inclusive
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Seattle, JND Legal Administration reported a lawsuit filed in the United States District Court District of New Jersey. The plaintiffs, Yang Renbin, Robert Angeline, Corey Hays, and Alexandre Tazi, are representing themselves and others similarly situated. The lawsuit is against GSX Techedu Inc. and Larry Xiangdong. The case involves allegations that are detailed in the lawsuit.

data.title: Hotel Sacher Vienna celebrates its 150th anniversary - with sculptures by Erwin Wurm
data.description: In Vienna, the iconic Hotel Sacher Vienna, established in 1876, is set to commemorate its remarkable 150th anniversary in 2026. To kick off the milestone year, the hotel unveiled two sculptures - "Step Big" and "Dancer" created by acclaimed artist Erwin Wurm - outside the hotel entrance.
